title: COMMUNITY SERVICES - 211info
text: ASTORIA RESCUE MISSION COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves three community meals including breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Operates a clothing closet, showers, and a laundry facility allowing one load per week. Accepts donations of hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, body wash, toilet paper, and toothpaste. 62 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Breakfast: 7 days per week 7am Lunch: 7 days per week noon Dinner: 7 days per week 5:30pm Showers: 7 days per week 3:30pm-5pm Laundry: 7 days per week 3:30pm-5pm Clothing Closet: 7 days per week 11am-5pm Email (503) 325-6243 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-6243 Main phone (503) 440-0789 Alternate Main phone (503) 325-6243 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Community Meals * Homelessness Issues General Clothing Provision * Homelessness Issues Laundry Facilities * Homelessness Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN'S SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
